careerContent.targetCompaniesText:
AtkinsRéalis: Data Analyst, Project Controls, Risk Analyst, PMO Analyst
Intact: Specialty Lines Dev, Commercial Lines Dev, Underwriting Associate
IQVIA: Associate Consultant, Business Analyst, Commercial Analytics
Munich Re / HSB: Underwriting Associate, Reinsurance Trainee, Risk Analyst
AstraZeneca: Business Insights, Commercial Excellence, Omnichannel Analyst
Zurich: Underwriting Trainee, Commercial Insurance Analyst
Sanofi: Commercial Excellence, Transformation Analyst
Marsh: Graduate Program, Risk Analyst, Broking Analyst
Metrolinx: Project Controls, PMO Analyst, Risk Analyst
Veeva: Associate Consultant, Data Operations, Analytics Associate
careerContent.searchLanesText:
Insurance / Reinsurance / Risk: 35%
Infrastructure / Project Controls: 35%
Healthcare Commercial Analytics: 25%
Banking / General Analyst: 5%
careerContent.strategicPlanText:
Week 1 (Jul 8–12): Apply to AtkinsRéalis Data Analyst role. Create master tracker. Set job alerts.
Week 2 (Jul 13–19): Build 3 résumé versions (Insurance, Infrastructure, Healthcare). Update LinkedIn.
Week 3 (Jul 20–26): Insurance networking (Intact, Munich Re, Zurich, Marsh). 12 messages, 2 calls.
Week 4 (Jul 27–Aug 2): Healthcare networking (IQVIA, AstraZeneca, Sanofi, Veeva). 12 messages, 3 calls.
Week 5 (Aug 3–9): Infrastructure networking (AtkinsRéalis, Metrolinx, OPG, Aecon, WSP). Learn P6/Power BI basics.
Week 6 (Aug 10–16): Prepare 8 STAR stories + 6 career-transition answers. Mock interviews.
Week 7 (Aug 17–23): Convert networking to referrals. Follow up with top contacts.
Week 8 (Aug 24–30): Prepare for fall recruiting. Identify graduate programs. Prepare transcripts.
Week 9 (Aug 31–Sep 6): Fall Application Surge — 12 apps, 15 messages, 3 calls. Target: 60-70 cumulative apps.
Week 10 (Sep 7–13): Funnel analysis. Revise weakest résumé. 2 mock interviews.
Week 11 (Sep 14–20): Decision Gate 1. Assess pipeline. If no interviews, broaden targets.
Week 12 (Sep 21–27): Create technical work sample (Project Controls Dashboard or Healthcare Campaign).
Week 13 (Sep 28–Oct 4): Re-engage all "stay in touch" contacts. Second application wave.
Week 14 (Oct 5–11): Direct recruiter outreach (AtkinsRéalis, Intact, Zurich, IQVIA, AstraZeneca, Marsh).
Week 15 (Oct 12–18): Interview conversion prep. Research business units. Thank-you follow-ups.
Week 16 (Oct 19–25): Expand company list if needed (Chubb, AIG, Roche, GSK, Hydro One, etc.)
Week 17 (Oct 26–Nov 1): Decision Gate 2. Target: 100+ apps, 6+ first-round, 2+ late-stage. If not, expand titles.
Week 18 (Nov 2–8): Shift to immediate-start hiring (0-2 yrs, 1-3 yrs roles). Apply to 1-3 year positions with 70% fit.
Week 19 (Nov 9–15): Final-round & offer preparation. Salary range, references, resignation language.
Week 20 (Nov 16–22): Concentrated referral push. 10 direct messages to strongest relationships.
Week 21 (Nov 23–29): December pipeline. Target January starts, backfills, contract-to-perm.
Week 22 (Nov 30–Dec 6): Decision Gate 3. Classify all active processes. If no offers, decide whether to continue.
Week 23 (Dec 7–13): Close or extend. Review offers. Conduct post-mortem if none.
Week 24 (Dec 14–20): Transition. Sign offer, resign professionally, prepare handover.
